country:

llm_prompt.user_question: show top 5 customers with highest order value

generated_sql:
SELECT c.company_name, SUM(o.freight) AS total_order_value
FROM customers c
JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
GROUP BY c.company_name
ORDER BY total_order_value DESC
LIMIT 5
